HGSS.647.0001:
Huh? Wha...? I can’t hear you.
Maybe we’ve got a bad connection.\f
Go somewhere else and try
calling again!
HGSS.647.0002:
Hello?!
Oh, hey, sorry for shouting!\f
I’m doing great!\f
HGSS.647.0003:
You know there’re some stronger
Gym Leaders around.\r
Don’t lose heart! Keep going!
HGSS.647.0004:
Let’s see... I’m free most Wednesday
nights. Give me a call then, OK?
HGSS.647.0005:
Oh hey! I just finished training.
Do you want to battle again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.647.0006:
All right!\f
I’ll be waiting over at the Fighting Dojo
in Saffron City!
HGSS.647.0008:
Hmm... You’re just battling me, right?
Don’t you have other plans?
HGSS.647.0009:
I’ll be waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City.\r
Look forward to it!
HGSS.647.0011:
Hey, didn’t we make plans to meet at
the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City?\r
Don’t tell me you forgot?\r
Come on, man! I’m waiting!
HGSS.647.0012:
You know, I spend a lot of time training
under a pounding waterfall every day.\f
I guess that’s why I’ve been
disagreeing with my wife a lot lately.\f
I was thinking of taking her on a trip as
an apology, but I can’t think of any\r
good places to go.\f
...That’s it!\f
I should take her to Tohjo Falls! What
do you think?
HGSS.647.0013:
You know, I’m just going to say this
once, but I...\f
I really like sweets. They’re the best.\f
After training every day, the thing
that I absolutely look forward to more\r
than anything is sneaking behind my\r
wife’s back to eat something sweet.\f
Fortunately, I haven’t been packing on
too many pounds...\f
Oh! Don’t tell my wife! Please!
HGSS.647.0014:
Lately my Gym’s waterfall device has
been malfunction... Aaaaahh!\f
Boomwhooshoowhooshoowhoosh\r
oowhooshoowhooshoowhoosh\r
oowhooshoowhooshoowhoosh...!\f
...Haa haaa haaaaa. Sorry.
While I was on the phone with you, the\r
device broke and I just got doused\r
with water.\f
I’ll call you back once things have
calmed down a bit here!
